name: non-spousal-joint-purchase-82ltv
rationale: Stacks: non-spousal joint applicants + purchase at 82% LTV. F1 aggregation (Layer 3 #7) intersects F2.AC awaiting_collateral activation + F4.HL dedicated collateral-ask generator. Interaction question: does Vienna route the high-LTV collateral ask to PRIMARY applicant only, BOTH applicants jointly, or admin-handoff? Layer 3 product-design + interaction-specific.
notes: Single-event sequence. Two Layer 3 items overlap; Phase 4.5 batched decisions.
